ops.title: Hunk-level ship: ccx vcs hunks + ship --skip-hunk/--only-hunk (VCS-native, zero worktree mutation)

ops.text: ccx vcs hunks lists file:A-B#digest refs; ship --skip-hunk/--only-hunk commits partial file content via jj diff-editor tool (jj lane) / temp index (git lane) without rewriting worktree files; empty selection refuses; live tests + CI jj step green; docs updated (README fold w/ f52cdc5, AGENTS entry 13, SKILL fragment)
